title: zanthoxylum chevalieri
intro: Zanthoxylum chevalieri, also known as the Chinese prickly ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum chevalieri include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve pain, and reduce fever, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Zanthoxylum chevalieri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine.
